description: Fix issues identified in semantic review: SQL injection in saveHolding(), /paper command returns hardcoded text, system prompt test duplicates constant, no URL-encoding on symbol in fetchPrice().
steps: Fix SQL injection in saveHolding() in crypto/paper_trading.cpp: use sqlite3_prepare_v2 + sqlite3_bind_text for both DELETE and INSERT statements, matching saveTrade() pattern.
Fix /paper Telegram command in system/mk_entry.cpp: call sys.paperTrading.getPortfolio() and sys.paperTrading.getStats() to get real data instead of hardcoded HTML.

Fix system prompt test in tests/test_main.cpp: remove the duplicate MK_SYSTEM_PROMPT_TEST constant and instead test expected substrings directly using a comment explaining the test validates expected prompt content.
Add URL-encoding for coinId in fetchPrice() in crypto/paper_trading.cpp: sanitize special characters before inserting into URL.
acceptance_criteria: saveHolding() uses parameterized queries for both DELETE and INSERT
/paper command shows real portfolio data from sys.paperTrading
System prompt test does not duplicate the full prompt string
